title: conditional step (control-flow, not args-bearing)
description: Schema for the 'conditional' step's control-flow fields (if/then/else at the step root, NOT under args). validate_step applies this against the step itself, not step['args'].

if.description: Comparator dict — must contain 'field' (a binding string) plus exactly one comparator key: eq, neq, gt, lt, in, or exists.

field.description: Template binding resolved from step/event context, e.g. '{{steps.s1.count}}'

in.description: Membership comparator — value to search for in field (list/str/dict)

exists.description: Truthy/falsy existence check on the field

then.description: Step id to jump to when the condition evaluates to true

else.description: Step id to jump to when the condition is false, or null to stop execution
